description: The cactus family — 1,750+ accepted species and extensive synonymy across ~127 genera native to the Americas. Virtually all Cactaceae are listed on CITES Appendix II, with select genera on Appendix I. The llifle.com Encyclopedia of Cacti documents 17,776 name records including synonyms, varieties and cultivars across 389 genera; all binomial entries are represented here.
meta_title: Cactaceae Taxonomy Pack — Complete Cacti Species Database
meta_description: Full Cactaceae species database from Mammillaria to Rhipsalis. 10,000+ binomial entries organized by genus with CITES conservation status.
meta_keywords: cactus, Mammillaria, Gymnocalycium, Astrophytum, Opuntia, Ferocactus, Echinopsis, cacti taxonomy, CITES
